buildCommand: cd bem-instalado/backend && npm run db:migrate:deploy && cd ../frontend && npm run build
installCommand: cd bem-instalado/backend && npm ci && cd ../frontend && npm ci

headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; object-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; upgrade-insecure-requests
